feature_tested: Spa Module Enhancements: Rooms, Qualifications, Credentials, Employee Types
summary: All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 7 tabs, Staff & Credentials with employee type badges, Rooms tab with 9 rooms, Dashboard KPIs (Rooms, Flagged Bookings, Expiring Creds), and qualification flag in appointments.

endpoints: GET /api/spa/rooms - Returns 9 rooms with room_type, capacity, equipment, status
Rooms have correct types: treatment, wet, nail, couples, sauna, steam
Rooms have required fields: id, name, room_type, capacity, equipment, status
GET /api/spa/therapists - Returns 6+ therapists with qualifications, credentials, employee_type
Therapists have qualifications array (non-empty)
Therapists have credentials array
Therapists have employee_type (in_house/outsourced)
GET /api/spa/therapists/{id} - Returns qualification_labels
Therapist detail has credentials with expiry dates
Therapist detail has recent_appointments
GET /api/spa/therapists/{id}/check-qualification - Returns qualified=true for Maria Santos + Swedish Massage
GET /api/spa/therapists/{id}/check-qualification - Returns qualified=false for Aisha Patel + Deep Tissue (missing_qualifications)
GET /api/spa/qualifications - Returns 20 qualification entries
Qualifications have id, label, category fields
GET /api/spa/dashboard - Returns total_rooms=9, available_rooms=9
Dashboard has flagged_bookings KPI
Dashboard has expiring_credentials KPI
Today's schedule includes room_name
POST /api/spa/appointments - Returns 409 when booking unqualified therapist (Aisha for Deep Tissue)
POST /api/spa/appointments with override_qualification=true - Creates appointment with qualification_flag
Appointments have room_id, room_name, qualification_flag fields
Credentials include types: license, certification, insurance

verified_elements: Spa Wellness panel loads with data-testid='spa-wellness-panel'
7 tabs present: Dashboard, Treatment Menu, Appointments, Client CRM, Staff & Credentials, Rooms, Promotions
Dashboard shows 9 KPI cards including Rooms (9/9), Flagged Bookings (1), Expiring Creds (2)
Dashboard Today's Schedule has Room column
Staff & Credentials tab shows 6 therapist cards
Therapist cards have IN HOUSE badge (green)
Therapist cards have OUTSOURCED badge (amber) for Elena Volkov
Therapist cards show qualification pills (swedish massage, deep tissue, etc.)
Therapist cards show credential count (e.g., '2 credentials')
Therapist detail panel shows Qualifications section with pills
Therapist detail panel shows Credentials & Licenses section
Credentials show Verified badge
Credentials show license numbers and expiry dates
Therapist detail shows Recent Appointments
Rooms tab shows 9 room cards
Room cards have type badges: TREATMENT, COUPLES, WET, NAIL, SAUNA, STEAM
Room cards show capacity (Cap: 1, 2, 3, 6, 8)
Room cards show equipment listings
Room cards show AVAILABLE status badge
Appointments tab has Room column
Appointments tab shows QUAL FLAG indicator for flagged booking

critical_code_review_comments: Room assignments correctly implemented with 9 rooms across 6 types (treatment, wet, nail, couples, sauna, steam)
Therapist qualifications correctly track 20 qualification types with proper mapping to treatments
Qualification check endpoint correctly flags unqualified therapists (e.g., nail tech for deep tissue)
Employee credentials properly track license, certification, insurance with expiry dates
Employee type tracking correctly distinguishes in_house vs outsourced staff
Booking API correctly blocks unqualified therapist (409) unless override_qualification=true
Dashboard KPIs correctly show total_rooms, available_rooms, flagged_bookings, expiring_credentials
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: 9 rooms, 6 therapists (5 in_house, 1 outsourced), 20 qualifications, 10 treatments with required_qualifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spa module fully enhanced with rooms, qualifications, credentials, and employee types. 7 tabs working: Dashboard, Treatment Menu, Appointments, Client CRM, Staff & Credentials, Rooms, Promotions. Qualification blocking works - booking Aisha Patel (nail tech) for Deep Tissue returns 409. Override with override_qualification=true sets qualification_flag. Email delivery still MOCKED (requires SendGrid/Resend).

mocked_apis.Spa promotion email delivery: Queued but not delivered - requires SendGrid/Resend integration

qualification_blocking.test_case: Aisha Patel (nail tech) booking Deep Tissue Massage
